title: Petrol, diesel prices expected to rise by  ₹10 per litre in next 2-3 weeks, inflation to go up: Economists
content:
Petrol and diesel prices are expected to rise by ₹10 per litre.
*   This increase is anticipated within the next 2-3 weeks.
*   Economists predict this will lead to an increase in overall inflation.

title: Who is Monica Witt? FBI offers $200,000 reward for ex-US Air Force officer accused of spying for Iran
content:
Monica Witt is an former U.S. Air Force officer.
*   She is accused of spying for Iran.
*   The FBI is offering a $200,000 reward for information about her.

title: Chud the Builder visibly disappointed as bond hits $1.25 million
content:
Chud the Builder is visibly disappointed.
*   This disappointment is directly linked to a bond reaching a value of $1.25 million.
*   The substantial financial figure of the bond appears to be an unfavorable development for Chud.

title: Trump-Xi summit ends with twist: US staff dump Chinese-issued phones, badges before boarding Air Force One
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Trump-Xi summit concluded with an unusual security measure.
*   US staff were instructed to dump Chinese-issued phones and badges.
*   This action occurred just before boarding Air Force One, signaling security concerns regarding the devices.

title: Supreme Court closes plea of Goa Congress leader after his death from snakebite
content:
The Supreme Court has closed a plea originally filed by a Goa Congress leader.
*   The court's decision follows the recent death of the Congress leader.
*   The leader reportedly died after suffering a snakebite.

title: Election Commission orders probe into voting by foreign nationals in Tamil Nadu Assembly elections
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Election Commission has ordered a probe.
*   The investigation will look into voting by foreign nationals.
*   This pertains to incidents that occurred during the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections.

title: 441 engineering students get placements at Kingston College near Katpadi
content:
**441 engineering students** have successfully secured job placements.
*   These placements were facilitated at **Kingston College**.
*   Kingston College is located in the region **near Katpadi**.
